---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Selected research and computational analysis"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: research
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "210px"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
---
